    Classroom - Enum Class in project2
    Enum Class for Classrooms, has two additional properties - Building and Campus
    close(Course, Time) - Method in class project2.Schedule
    Close a section by course+time with enrolled check.
    compareTo(Profile) - Method in class project2.Profile
    Compares two project2.Profile Objects, first by lastname, then firstname, then date of birth
    compareTo(Student) - Method in class project2.Student
    Overrides compareTo() method Uses student profiles to compare
    compareTo(Student, String) - Method in class project2.Student
    Same functionality as other compareTo() function, used for overriding in Sort method
    compareTo(Date) - Method in class util.Date
    Compares two date objects
    contains(E) - Method in class util.List
     
    contains(Student) - Method in class project2.Section

    Course - Enum Class in project2
    Enum Class for Courses, includes additional properties: Credit Hours, Standing & Major

    Total enrolled credits for a student based on current schedule rosters.

    tuition(int) - Method in class project2.International
     
    tuition(int) - Method in class project2.NonResident
     
    tuition(int) - Method in class project2.Resident
    Tuition method for Resident students Rules: - Part-time (<12): per-credit + half university fee; scholarship does NOT apply - Full-time (>=12): full tuition + university fee (+ extra per-credit beyond 16) - scholarship
    tuition(int) - Method in class project2.Student
     
    tuition(int) - Method in class project2.TriState
